scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) propagates IllegalStateException when TreeBuilder.parse(Reader) throws
scenarios.precondition: Parser with stubbed TreeBuilder whose parse(Reader,baseUri,parser) throws IllegalStateException("stub read fail")
pseudocode: @Override public Document parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) {
@Override public Document parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser p) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); }
@Override public java.util.List<org.jsoup.nodes.Node> parseFragment(Reader in, org.jsoup.nodes.Element context, String uri, Parser p) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); }
throws IllegalStateException with message "stub read fail";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) propagates IllegalStateException when TreeBuilder.parse(Reader) throws via string overload
scenarios.precondition: Parser with stubbed TreeBuilder whose parse(Reader,baseUri,parser) throws IllegalStateException("stub string fail")

@Override public java.util.List<org.jsoup.nodes.Node> parseFragment(Reader in, org.jsoup.nodes.Element context, String uri, Parser p) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); }
throws IllegalStateException with message "stub string fail";
